name: C-15 freshness gate defaults to weekly fetch-frequency when --fetch-frequency is omitted per the architecture
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/soc2-tsc.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id soc2-tsc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && echo defaulted 1>&2
